generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T ARANEA SCINENCIA. A gray spider found in Kentucky on old walls. "Does not spin a web." Authority. Dr. Wm. Rowley, N. Am. Journ. of Hom., 7, 64; two provings (1, "N. S." 2, "E. P.") with the 1st and 2d dilutions. MIND. ► Could not collect his thoughts (with slight pain in head), (second day), [1] . HEAD. ► Vertigo worse when stooping (third day), [1] . ► Vertigo, with nausea (after two hours), [2] . ► Severe pain in head, affecting the eyes (immediately), [1] . ► Slight pains in head (after fifteen minutes), [1] . ► Dull, heavy pain in head all day (second day), [1] . ► Dull, sluggish pain, but quite intense, all over the head (after one and a half hours), [1] . ► After dinner, dull pain in head, rather increased till after supper, when it was relieved (first day), [2] . ► Head dull, with heavy, painful fulness (fourth day), [1] . [10.] ► Dull, stupid feeling in head, with feeling of fulness and dull, aching pain (after two hours), [2] . ► Dull, heavy pain in postero-superior part of head (after twenty minutes), [1] . ► Could not rest on account of pain in head, [1] . EYES. ► Eyes feel weak and inflamed (second day), [1] . ► Eyes felt heavy, with a blur over them (after one and a half hours), [1] . ► Constant twitching of the under lids (second day), [1] . ► Eyelids swollen (third day), [1] . ► Eyes run a good deal (second day), [1] . ► There seems to be a blur constantly collecting over the eyes (second day), [1] . ► Glimmering before the eyes (immediately), [2] . MOUTH. [20.] ► Rather profuse flow of saliva (immediately), [2] . ► Sweet taste in the mouth (immediately), [2] . ► Dryness and prickling in throat (immediately), [2] . STOMACH. ► Foul stomach (second day), [1] . ► Slight pain in stomach (after two hours), [2] . ► Sour eructations (after two hours), [2] . ► Slight nausea (after one and a half hours), [1] . ► Strange feeling in stomach, as if he had not eaten for a long time, continuing for about an hour (after half an hour), [1] . ABDOMEN. ► Very unpleasant dull rumbling pains in bowels (second day), [1] . ► Colic increased by bending forward (immediately), [2] . STOOL AND ANUS. [30.] ► Sensation as if the bowels were loosened (after two hours), [2] . ► Bowels costive (second day), [1] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Increased secretion of urine, so that he had to get up twice during the night, [1] . ► Urine cloudy, [1] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Slight palpitation of the heart on waking, which soon passed off (second day), [2] . GENERALITIES. ► Felt fatigued, physically and mentally, as though he had labored hard (had felt uncommonly well in the morning), (after two hours), [2] . ► Felt uncommonly well in the morning, with good appetite for breakfast (second day), [2] . ► The whole system appears deranged (second day), [1] . ► Felt as if he had been drinking (immediately), [1] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepy on sitting down (fourth day), [1] . [40.] ► Slept well all night (usually restless and sleeps but little), (first day), [2] . ► Uncommonly sound sleep at night (immediately), [2] . ► Felt as if he had been broken of his rest, yet did not seem sleepy (after one and a half hours), [1] . ► Very restless during night; could sleep but a few moments at a time, and then not soundly, [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Bending forward ), Vertigo; colic. ► ( After dinner ), Dull pain in head. ► ( On waking ), Slight palpitation of the heart. ► ( Warm room ), All symptoms. ► Amelioration. ► ( Morning ), Felt uncommonly well. ► ( Open air ), Symptoms rather relieved. ► ( After supper ), Pain in head. Clinical: Debility; Eyes, affections of; Headache

keynotes.text: Aran. scin. has been proved in 1st and 2nd dilutions. One remarkable symptom noticed was: "Constant twitching of under eyelids," which brings this spider into line with the choreic Mygale. Eyes inflamed, weak, watery, lids swollen. Rather profuse flow of saliva; sweet taste in mouth. Much dull, stupid headache of considerable intensity, especially in postero-superior part of head; unable to rest for it; could not collect thoughts with it. Felt as if he had been drinking. Sleepiness. All symptoms in warm room.

_raw: Compare: Spiders generally. Agar.; Carb. v. ( warm room, also Puls., Apis, Sul., &c.). Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
